Function Documentation

◆ add_to_info()

int add_to_info ( Block_data  block)

Definition at line 555 of file write_snapshot.c.

556{
557 /* adds a block to the structure needed to write the INFO block */
558 if (ThisTask!=collector)
559 return 0;
560
561 if (NextBlock>=NBlocks)
562 {
563 if (!ThisTask)
564 printf("ERROR: I am trying to write the %d N-th block but NBLOCKS=%d\n",
565 NextBlock+1,NBlocks);
566 return 1;
567 }
568
569 my_strcpy(InfoBlock[NextBlock].name,block.name,4);
570 my_strcpy(InfoBlock[NextBlock].type,block.type,8);
571 InfoBlock[NextBlock].ndim=block.ndim;
572 /* pinocchio snapshots have only one particle type */
573 for (int i=0; i<6; i++)
574 InfoBlock[NextBlock].active[i]=(i==1);
575
576 NextBlock++;
577
578 return 0;
579}

◆ initialize_2LPT()

int initialize_2LPT ( Block_data *  block)

Definition at line 772 of file write_snapshot.c.

773{
774 /* this routine initializes the ID block when particles live in sub-volume domain */
775
776 my_strcpy(block->name,"2LPT",4);
777 my_strcpy(block->type,"FLOATN ",8);
778 block->sizeof_type = sizeof(AuxStruct);
779 block->ndim=3;
780
781 /* each task builds its catalogue */
782 block->data = (void *)malloc(Npart_array[collector] * sizeof(AuxStruct));
783 if (block->data==0x0)
784 {
785 printf("ERROR on Task %d: could not allocate block to be written in snapshot\n",ThisTask);
786 return 1;
787 }
788
789 /* loop on all particles */
790 for (int i=0; i < MyGrids[0].total_local_size; i++)
791 {
792 ((AuxStruct*)block->data)[i].axis[0] = products[i].Vel_2LPT[0];
793 ((AuxStruct*)block->data)[i].axis[1] = products[i].Vel_2LPT[1];
794 ((AuxStruct*)block->data)[i].axis[2] = products[i].Vel_2LPT[2];
795 }
796
797 return 0;
798}

803 /* this routine initializes the ID block when particles live in sub-volume domain */

806 my_strcpy(block->type,"FLOATN ",8);
807 block->sizeof_type = sizeof(AuxStruct);

809

672{
673 /* this routine initializes the density */
674
675 my_strcpy(block->name,"DENS",4);
676 my_strcpy(block->type,"FLOATN ",8);
677 block->sizeof_type = sizeof(float);
678 block->ndim=1;
679
680 /* each task builds its catalogue: IDs */
681 block->data = (void *)malloc(Npart_array[collector] * sizeof(float));
682 if (block->data==0x0)
683 {
684 printf("ERROR on Task %d: could not allocate block to be written in snapshot\n",ThisTask);
685 return 1;
686 }
687
688 /* loop on all particles */
689 for (int i=0; i < MyGrids[ThisGrid].total_local_size; i++)
690 ((float*)block->data)[i] = density[ThisGrid][i];
691
692 return 0;
693}

◆ initialize_ID()

int initialize_ID ( Block_data *  block)

Definition at line 623 of file write_snapshot.c.

624{
625 /* this routine initializes the ID block */
626
627 my_strcpy(block->name,"ID ",4);
628#ifdef LONGIDS
629 my_strcpy(block->type,"LLONG ",8);
630 block->sizeof_type = sizeof(unsigned long long);
631#else
632 my_strcpy(block->type,"LONG ",8);
633 block->sizeof_type = sizeof(unsigned int);
634#endif
635 block->ndim=1;
636
637 /* each task builds its catalogue: IDs */
638 block->data = (void *)malloc(Npart_array[collector] * sizeof(MYIDTYPE));
639 if (block->data==0x0)
640 {
641 printf("ERROR on Task %d: could not allocate block to be written in snapshot\n",ThisTask);
642 return 1;
643 }
644
645 fflush(stdout);
646 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
647
648 /* loop on all particles */
649 for (int local_x = 0; local_x < MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_x_]; local_x++)
650 {
651 int idx_x = local_x * MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_y_];
652 MYIDTYPE IDX_x = (local_x + MyGrids[0].GSstart[_x_]) * MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_];
653 for (int local_y = 0; local_y < MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_y_]; local_y++)
654 {
655 int idx_y = (idx_x + local_y) * MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_z_];
656 MYIDTYPE IDX_y = (IDX_x + local_y + MyGrids[0].GSstart[_y_]) * MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_];
657 for (int local_z = 0; local_z < MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_z_]; local_z++)
658 {
659
660 /* NB this is coherent with INDEX_TO_COORD */
661 ((MYIDTYPE*)block->data)[idx_y + local_z] = 1 + IDX_y + local_z + MyGrids[0].GSstart[_z_];
662
663 }
664 }
665 }
666
667 return 0;
668}

◆ initialize_POS()

int initialize_POS ( Block_data *  block)

Definition at line 907 of file write_snapshot.c.

908{
909 /* initializes the POS block by moving all particles with LPT */
910 int ibox, jbox, kbox;
911
912 my_strcpy(block->name,"POS ",4);
913 my_strcpy(block->type,"FLOATN ",8);
914 block->sizeof_type = sizeof(AuxStruct);
915 block->ndim=3;
916
917 /* each task builds its catalogue: Pos */
918 block->data = (void *)malloc(Npart_array[collector] * sizeof(AuxStruct));
919 if (block->data==0x0)
920 {
921 printf("ERROR on Task %d: could not allocate block to be written in snapshot\n",ThisTask);
922 return 1;
923 }
924
925 /* loop on all particles */
926 for (int i=0; i < MyGrids[0].total_local_size; i++)
927 {
928 INDEX_TO_COORD(i, ibox, jbox, kbox, MyGrids[0].GSlocal);
929 int q[3]={ibox+MyGrids[0].GSstart[0],jbox+MyGrids[0].GSstart[1],kbox+MyGrids[0].GSstart[2]};
930
931 for (int j=0; j<3; j++)
932 {
933 PRODFLOAT pos = q[j] + SHIFT + products[i].Vel[j]; // * myobj.D;
934#ifdef TWO_LPT
935 pos += products[i].Vel_2LPT[j]; // * myobj.D2;
936#ifdef THREE_LPT
937 pos += products[i].Vel_3LPT_1[j] // * myobj.D31
938 + products[i].Vel_3LPT_2[j]; // * myobj.D32;
939#endif
940#endif
941 if (pos>=MyGrids[0].GSglobal[j]) pos-=MyGrids[0].GSglobal[j];
942 if (pos< 0.0) pos+=MyGrids[0].GSglobal[j];
943
944 ((AuxStruct*)block->data)[i].axis[j] = (float)(pos * params.InterPartDist * params.Hubble100)
945#ifdef POS_IN_KPC
946 * 1000.
947#endif
948 ;
949 }
950 }
951
952 return 0;
953
954}

#define SHIFT

721 /* this routine initializes the RMAX block */
722
723 my_strcpy(block->name,"RMAX",4);
724 my_strcpy(block->type,"LONG ",8);
725 block->sizeof_type = sizeof(int);
726 block->ndim=1;
727
728 /* each task builds its catalogue: IDs */
729 block->data = (void *)malloc(Npart_array[collector] * sizeof(int));

◆ initialize_VEL()

int initialize_VEL ( Block_data *  block)

Definition at line 957 of file write_snapshot.c.

958{
959
960 /* initializes the VEL block by moving all particles with LPT */
961
962 my_strcpy(block->name,"VEL ",4);
963 my_strcpy(block->type,"FLOATN ",8);
964 block->sizeof_type = sizeof(AuxStruct);
965 block->ndim=3;
966
967 /* each task builds its catalogue: Vel */
968 block->data = (void *)malloc(Npart_array[collector] * sizeof(AuxStruct));
969 if (block->data==0x0)
970 {
971 printf("ERROR on Task %d: could not allocate block to be written in snapshot\n",ThisTask);
972 return 1;
973 }
974
975 /* Warning: the scale for fomega should be set somehow... (very little impact) */
976 double vfact=Hubble(redshift)/(1.+redshift)*params.InterPartDist * (1+redshift) * fomega(redshift, params.k_for_GM)/sqrt(1.+outputs.z[myiout]);
977
978 /* loop on all particles */
979 for (int i=0; i < MyGrids[0].total_local_size; i++)
980 {
981 for (int j=0; j<3; j++)
982 {
983 PRODFLOAT vv = products[i].Vel[j]; //* myobj.Dv;
984#ifdef TWO_LPT
985 vv += products[i].Vel_2LPT[j];// * myobj.D2v;
986#ifdef THREE_LPT
987 vv += products[i].Vel_3LPT_1[j] // * myobj.D31v
988 + products[i].Vel_3LPT_1[j]; // * myobj.D32v;
989#endif
990#endif
991 ((AuxStruct*)block->data)[i].axis[j]=(float)(vv * vfact);
992 }
993 }
994
995 return 0;
996}
fomega
double fomega(double z, double k)

745 /* this routine initializes the ZEL block */
746
747 my_strcpy(block->name,"ZEL ",4);
748 my_strcpy(block->type,"FLOATN ",8);
749 block->sizeof_type = sizeof(AuxStruct);
750 block->ndim=3;
751
752 /* each task builds its catalogue */
753 block->data = (void *)malloc(Npart_array[collector] * sizeof(AuxStruct));
754 if (block->data==0x0)
755 {
756 printf("ERROR on Task %d: could not allocate block to be written in snapshot\n",ThisTask);
757 return 1;
758 }
759
760 /* loop on all particles */
761 for (int i=0; i < MyGrids[0].total_local_size; i++)
762 {
763 ((AuxStruct*)block->data)[i].axis[0] = products[i].Vel[0];
764 ((AuxStruct*)block->data)[i].axis[1] = products[i].Vel[1];
765 ((AuxStruct*)block->data)[i].axis[2] = products[i].Vel[2];
766 }
767
768 return 0;
769}

References collector, Block_data::data, my_strcpy(), MyGrids, Block_data::name, Block_data::ndim, Npart_array, products, Block_data::sizeof_type, ThisTask, grid_data::total_local_size, Block_data::type, and product_data::Vel.

◆ write_block()

int write_block ( Block_data  block)

Definition at line 505 of file write_snapshot.c.

506{
507 /* writes a specified block in the snapshot */
508 int npart, next, itask;
509 unsigned long dummy_4;
510 unsigned long long dummy_8;
511
512 if (ThisTask==collector)
513 {
514 dummy_8=NPartInFile*block.sizeof_type;
515 if (dummy_8>largest32-10)
516 dummy_4=0;
517 else
518 dummy_4=(unsigned long)dummy_8;
519 WriteBlockName(file,dummy_8,block.name);
520 fwrite(&dummy_4, sizeof(dummy_4), 1, file);
521 fwrite(block.data, block.sizeof_type, myNpart, file);
522 }
523
524 for (next=1; next<NTasksPerFile; next++)
525 {
526 itask=collector+next;
527 if (ThisTask==collector)
528 {
529 npart=0;
530 MPI_Recv(&npart, 1, MPI_INT, itask, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD, &status);
531 MPI_Recv(block.data, npart*block.sizeof_type, MPI_BYTE, itask, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD, &status);
532 fwrite(block.data, block.sizeof_type, npart, file);
533 }
534 else if (ThisTask==itask)
535 {
536 MPI_Send(&myNpart, 1, MPI_INT, collector, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
537 MPI_Send(block.data, myNpart*block.sizeof_type, MPI_BYTE, collector, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
538 }
539 }
540
541 /* collector task closes the block */
542 if (ThisTask==collector)
543 fwrite(&dummy_4, sizeof(dummy_4), 1, file);
544
545 return 0;
546}

◆ write_density()

int write_density ( int  ThisGrid)

Definition at line 344 of file write_snapshot.c.

345{
346 /* writes the fmax products as in a snapshot format */
347
348 Block_data block;
349
350 /* Snapshot filename */
351 sprintf(filename,"pinocchio.%s.density%d.out",params.RunFlag,ThisGrid);
352
353 /* allocates structure to handle the INFO block */
354 NBlocks=2;
355 NextBlock=0;
356 InfoBlock=(Block_data *)calloc(NBlocks, sizeof(Block_data));
357
358 if (!ThisTask)
359 printf("[%s] Writing density in snapshot file %s\n",fdate(),filename);
360
361 /* this routine opens the file */
362 if (write_header())
363 return 1;
364
365 /* writing of IDs */
366 if (initialize_ID(&block))
367 return 1;
368 if (add_to_info(block))
369 return 1;
370 if (write_block(block))
371 return 1;
372 free_block(block);
373
374 /* writing of density */
375 if (initialize_density(ThisGrid, &block))
376 return 1;
377 if (add_to_info(block))
378 return 1;
379 if (write_block(block))
380 return 1;
381 free_block(block);
382
383 /* writing of INFO block */
384 if (write_info_block())
385 return 1;
386 free(InfoBlock);
387
388 /* collector task closes the file */
389 if (ThisTask==collector)
390 fclose(file);
391
392 fflush(stdout);
393 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
394
395 return 0;
396
397}
fdate
char * fdate()

Definition write_snapshot.c:82

◆ write_header()

int write_header ( )

Definition at line 400 of file write_snapshot.c.

401{
402
403 /* This function counts the number of particles that the task will write in the snapshot
404 and writes the snapshot header.
405 The type of particles depend on the type of snapshot that is being written...
406 */
407
408 int itask, dummy;
409 unsigned long long int myNtotal;
410 char my_filename[LBLENGTH],tag[SBLENGTH];
411 int *tmp_array;
412 SnapshotHeader_data Header;
413
414 NTasksPerFile=NTasks/params.NumFiles;
415 ThisFile=ThisTask/NTasksPerFile;
416 collector=ThisFile*NTasksPerFile;
417
418 myNpart = MyGrids[0].total_local_size;
419
420 /* Number of particles in each file */
421 Npart_array = (int*)calloc(params.NumFiles, sizeof(int));
422 tmp_array = (int*)calloc(params.NumFiles, sizeof(int));
423 tmp_array[collector]=myNpart;
424
425 /* this computes the number of particles in each file */
426 MPI_Reduce(tmp_array, Npart_array, params.NumFiles, MPI_INT, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
427 MPI_Bcast(Npart_array, params.NumFiles, MPI_INT, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
428 NPartInFile=Npart_array[collector];
429
430 /* total number of particles that will be contained in the complete snapshot */
431 for (myNtotal=0, itask=0; itask<params.NumFiles; itask++)
432 myNtotal+=Npart_array[itask];
433
434 /* sets arrays to zero (probably superfluous) */
435 memset(tmp_array, 0, params.NumFiles*sizeof(int));
436 memset(Npart_array, 0, params.NumFiles*sizeof(int));
437 tmp_array[collector]=myNpart;
438
439 /* this computes the largest number of particles a task can have for each collector */
440 MPI_Reduce(tmp_array, Npart_array, params.NumFiles, MPI_INT, MPI_MAX, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
441 MPI_Bcast(Npart_array, params.NumFiles, MPI_INT, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
442 free(tmp_array);
443
444 // if (!ThisTask)
445 // printf("[%s] The snapshot will contain a total of %Ld particles (true total number: %Ld, duplication factor: %f percent)\n",
446 // fdate(), myNtotal, MyGrids[0].Ntotal, 100.*(double)(myNtotal-MyGrids[0].Ntotal)/(double)MyGrids[0].Ntotal);
447
448 /* The collector task opens the file and writes the header */
449 if (ThisTask==collector)
450 {
451 strcpy(my_filename,filename);
452 if (params.NumFiles>1)
453 {
454 sprintf(tag,".%d",ThisFile);
455 strcat(my_filename,tag);
456 }
457
458 if (!ThisTask)
459 printf("[%s] Task 0 will write %d particles out of %Ld in snapshot file %s\n",fdate(), NPartInFile, MyGrids[0].Ntotal, my_filename);
460
461 if ( (file=fopen(my_filename,"w"))==0x0)
462 {
463 printf("Error on Task %d: cannot open file %s\n",ThisTask,my_filename);
464 return 1;
465 }
466
467 /* writes information on the snapshot header */
468 memset(&Header, 0, sizeof(SnapshotHeader_data));
469
470 Header.NPart[1]=NPartInFile;
471 Header.Mass[1]=params.ParticleMass*params.Hubble100*1e-10;
472 Header.NPartTotal[1]=(unsigned int)( (myNtotal<<32) >>32 );
473 Header.npartTotalHighWord[1]=(unsigned int)(myNtotal>>32);
474 Header.Time=1./(1+outputs.z[myiout]);
475 Header.RedShift=outputs.z[myiout];
476 Header.flag_sfr=0;
477 Header.flag_feedback=0;
478 Header.flag_cooling=0;
479 Header.num_files=params.NumFiles;
480 Header.BoxSize=params.BoxSize_h100;
481#ifdef POS_IN_KPC
482 Header.BoxSize*=1000.;
483#endif
484 Header.Omega0=params.Omega0;
485 Header.OmegaLambda=params.OmegaLambda;
486 Header.HubbleParam=params.Hubble100;
487 Header.flag_stellarage=0;
488 Header.flag_metals=0;
489 Header.flag_entropy_instead_u=0;
490 Header.flag_metalcooling=0;
491 Header.flag_stellarevolution=0;
492
493 dummy=sizeof(SnapshotHeader_data);
494 WriteBlockName(file,dummy,"HEAD");
495 fwrite(&dummy, sizeof(dummy), 1, file);
496 fwrite(&Header, dummy, 1, file);
497 fwrite(&dummy, sizeof(dummy), 1, file);
498
499 }
500
501 return 0;
502}

583{
584 /* writes the INFO block */
585 int dummy,tb;
586 char wn[5],wt[9];
587
588 if (ThisTask!=collector)
589 return 0;
590
591 for (tb=0; tb<NBlocks; tb++)
592 {
593
594 if (!ThisTask)
595 {
596 my_strcpy(wn,InfoBlock[tb].name,4);
597 wn[4]='\0';
598 my_strcpy(wt,InfoBlock[tb].type,8);
599 wt[8]='\0';
600 printf("Written block: name=%s, type=%s, ndim=%d, active=[%d,%d,%d,%d,%d,%d]\n",
601 wn,wt,
602 InfoBlock[tb].ndim,
603 InfoBlock[tb].active[0],
604 InfoBlock[tb].active[1],
605 InfoBlock[tb].active[2],
606 InfoBlock[tb].active[3],
607 InfoBlock[tb].active[4],
608 InfoBlock[tb].active[5]);
609 }
610 }
611
612 dummy=NBlocks*40;
613 WriteBlockName(file,dummy,"INFO");
614 fwrite(&dummy, sizeof(dummy), 1, file);
615 for (tb=0; tb<NBlocks; tb++)
616 fwrite(&InfoBlock[tb], sizeof(char), 40, file);
617 fwrite(&dummy, sizeof(dummy), 1, file);
618
619 return 0;
620}

139{
140 /* write positions of all particles obtained with LPT */
141
142 Block_data block;
143 //myiout=0;
144 //set_point_timedep(outputs.z[myiout]);
145 redshift = outputs.z[0];
146
147 /* Snapshot filename */
148 sprintf(filename,"pinocchio.%6.4f.%s.LPT_snapshot.out",outputs.z[myiout],params.RunFlag);
149
150 /* allocates structure to handle the INFO block */
151 NBlocks=4;
152 NextBlock=0;
153 InfoBlock=(Block_data *)calloc(NBlocks, sizeof(Block_data));
154
155 if (!ThisTask)
156 printf("[%s] Writing snapshot file %s\n",fdate(),filename);
157
158 /* this routine opens the file */
159 if (write_header())
160 return 1;
161
162 /* writing of IDs */
163 if (initialize_ID(&block))
164 return 1;
165 if (add_to_info(block))
166 return 1;
167 if (write_block(block))
168 return 1;
169 free_block(block);
170
171 /* writing of POS */
172 if (initialize_POS(&block))
173 return 1;
174 if (add_to_info(block))
175 return 1;
176 if (write_block(block))
177 return 1;
178 free_block(block);
179
180 /* writing of VEL */
181 if (initialize_VEL(&block))
182 return 1;
183 if (add_to_info(block))
184 return 1;
185 if (write_block(block))
186 return 1;
187 free_block(block);
188
189 /* writing of INFO block */
190 if (write_info_block())
191 return 1;
192 free(Npart_array);
193 free(InfoBlock);
194
195 /* collector task closes the file */
196 if (ThisTask==collector)
197 fclose(file);
198
199 fflush(stdout);
200 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
201
202 return 0;
203

208{
209 /* writes the fmax products as in a snapshot format */
210
211 Block_data block;
212
213 /* Snapshot filename */
214 sprintf(filename,"pinocchio.%s.t_snapshot.out",params.RunFlag);
215
216 myiout=outputs.n-1;
217
218 /* allocates structure to handle the INFO block */
219#ifdef TWO_LPT
220#ifdef THREE_LPT
221 NBlocks=8;
222#else
223 NBlocks=6;
224#endif
225#else
226 NBlocks=4;
227#endif
228#ifdef ADD_RMAX_TO_SNAPSHOT
229 ++NBlocks;
230#endif
231
232 NextBlock=0;
233 InfoBlock=(Block_data *)calloc(NBlocks, sizeof(Block_data));
234
235 if (!ThisTask)
236 printf("[%s] Writing products in snapshot file %s\n",fdate(),filename);
237
238 /* this routine opens the file */
239 if (write_header())
240 return 1;
241
242 /* writing of IDs */
243 if (initialize_ID(&block))
244 return 1;
245 if (add_to_info(block))
246 return 1;
247 if (write_block(block))
248 return 1;
249 free_block(block);
250
251#ifdef ADD_RMAX_TO_SNAPSHOT
252 /* writing of RMAX */
253 if (initialize_RMAX(&block))
254 return 1;
255 if (add_to_info(block))
256 return 1;
257 if (write_block(block))
258 return 1;
259 free_block(block);
260#endif
261
262 /* writing of FMAX */
263 if (initialize_FMAX(&block))
264 return 1;
265 if (add_to_info(block))
266 return 1;
267 if (write_block(block))
268 return 1;
269 free_block(block);
270
271 /* writing of VEL */
272 if (initialize_ZEL(&block))
273 return 1;
274 if (add_to_info(block))
275 return 1;
276 if (write_block(block))
277 return 1;
278 free_block(block);
279
280#ifdef TWO_LPT
281 /* writing of VEL2 */
282 if (initialize_2LPT(&block))
283 return 1;
284 if (add_to_info(block))
285 return 1;
286 if (write_block(block))
287 return 1;
288 free_block(block);
289
290#ifdef THREE_LPT
291 /* writing of VL31 */
292 if (initialize_3LPT_1(&block))
293 return 1;
294 if (add_to_info(block))
295 return 1;
296 if (write_block(block))
297 return 1;
298 free_block(block);
299
300 /* writing of VL32 */
301 if (initialize_3LPT_2(&block))
302 return 1;
303 if (add_to_info(block))
304 return 1;
305 if (write_block(block))
306 return 1;
307 free_block(block);
308#endif
309#endif
310
311 /* writing of ZACC */
312 if (initialize_ZACC(&block))
313 return 1;
314 if (add_to_info(block))
315 return 1;
316 if (write_block(block))
317 return 1;
318 free_block(block);
319
320 /* writing of particle GROUP_ID */
321 if (initialize_GRUP(&block))
322 return 1;
323 if (add_to_info(block))
324 return 1;
325 if (write_block(block))
326 return 1;
327 free_block(block);
328
329 /* writing of INFO block */
330 if (write_info_block())
331 return 1;
332 free(InfoBlock);
333
334 /* collector task closes the file */
335 if (ThisTask==collector)
336 fclose(file);
337
338 fflush(stdout);
339 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
340
341 return 0;
342}

1001

◆ collector
